note: Two Fed reviews are the medium-term regime drivers. Recommendations expected by year-end 2026. Update status as announcements land.

items.name: Monetary-policy framework review
items.detail: Five-year review of strategy, tools and communications (the '2%/average-inflation-targeting' framework).

items.name: Communications task force
items.detail: Forward-guidance & SEP/dot-plot communication practices — central to the FOMC-centric → data-centric vol shift.

items.name: Balance-sheet task force
items.detail: Ample-reserves regime, QT end-state and SOMA composition — shapes dealer capacity and rates vol.
